## Change type

- [ ] New lesson
- [ ] Fix existing lesson

## Checklist

- [ ] Code runs without errors using listed dependencies
- [ ] No comments in code files (explanations go in docs, code is self-explanatory)
- [ ] Implements from scratch first, then demonstrates with frameworks (for new lessons)
- [ ] Lesson directory follows `LESSON_TEMPLATE.md` structure
- [ ] ROADMAP.md row for this lesson is a markdown link (`[Name](phases/...)`), not plain text
- [ ] Each commit contains only one lesson (atomic commit rule)
- [ ] Tested locally / code output matches what `docs/en.md` describes
